name: Lemon-Poppy Bundt Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup + 1 tablespoon butter or margarine, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Melt 1 tablespoon butter; brush over inside of a 12-cup Bundt pan.
3. In a bowl, combine flour, poppy seeds, baking powder and soda.
4. With a mixer at medium speed, beat granulated sugar with the remaining butter until light and fluffy, about 3 minutes.
5. Beat in eggs, one at a time, until combined.
6. Beat in sour cream, 1/4 cup juice, zest and vanilla.
7. Reduce speed to low; gradually beat in flour mixture until just combined.
8. Pour batter into pan.
9. Bake for 45-50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Cool for 10 minutes. Remove cake from pan; cool completely on a rack.
11. Combine confectioners' sugar with remaining juice and zest; drizzle over cake.
